name: Chicken Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Place a chicken breast between two sheets of wax paper or plastic wrap and pound to an even thickness of 1/4-inch with the bottom of a small skillet or the blunt side of a meat mallet. Repeat with remaining chicken breasts.
2. Mix the sage, salt, pepper, and garlic together. Rub this mixture onto one side of each chicken breast.
3. Place a slice of ham over the seasoned side, then roll the chicken into a spiral. Secure the roll tightly with toothpicks or string.
4. Lightly coat the rolls in flour, shaking off any excess.
5. Heat oil in a skillet over medium heat. Add the rolls carefully to avoid overcrowding and cook until golden brown on the bottom.
6. Turn the rolls with tongs and continue cooking until all sides are brown and the chicken is cooked through in the center, about 15 to 20 minutes.
7. Drain on paper towels and serve immediately. Serves 6.
